title: A Fifth of a Country

mood.label: Heavy going
mood.summary: A world at 45/100 — a fraying US-Iran ceasefire, Israel past the Litani holding nearly a fifth of Lebanon, and a record May heat dome weigh the day down, while record equities and quiet medical breakthroughs keep it from going dark.

pattern: stack(s("bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~, ~ ~ ~ ~ rim ~ ~ ~, ~ ~ hh ~ ~ ~ hh ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.5).room(0.2), note("<[a2,c3,e3] [f2,a2,c3] [d3,f3,a3] [e3,g3,b3]>").s("sawtooth").attack(0.6).decay(0.5).sustain(0.55).release(2.4).lpf(1800).gain(0.28).room(0.45).rsize(4), note("a1 ~ a1 ~ f1 ~ f1 ~ d2 ~ d2 ~ e2 ~ e2 ~").s("sine").attack(0.04).decay(0.2).sustain(0.6).release(0.4).lpf(500).gain(0.5), note("a4 ~ c5 ~ b4 a4 ~ ~ f4 ~ a4 c5 ~ b4 ~ ~ d5 ~ c5 a4 ~ g4 ~ ~ e4 ~ g4 ~ a4 ~ ~ ~").s("triangle").attack(0.03).decay(0.2).sustain(0.3).release(0.6).lpf(2800).gain(0.42).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.42).room(0.35))

lines: They raised a flag on Beaufort and counted what the maps had moved,
a fifth of a country under boots, a million somewhere else.
Over the Strait the markets climb a wall the drones flew through —
record highs on the trading floor, the rest of it kept to itself.
The heat dome sat on Europe like a hand that wouldn't lift,
thirty-four point eight in May and seven names it took.
But somewhere quiet a vitamin learned to coax a neuron back,
a nasal spray, a centenary park — small lines in a heavy book.
Forty-five out of a hundred, heavy going but it holds,
one side fire and one side hope and neither one will fold.
We keep the ledger honest even when the numbers ache —
still here at the end of the day, still counting what we make.
